summary: Added isolated automation coverage for the release version bump tooling. The new tests execute the real bump-version and set-build-number scripts against temporary project fixtures, proving major/minor/patch semantics, synchronized MARKETING_VERSION replacement, timestamp build-number generation, CHANGELOG promotion, and invalid-input non-mutation without touching the real app version or build number.
validations_passed: git fetch origin main && git pull --rebase origin main
missing_proof_levels: No app behavior, release archive, TestFlight install, App Store Connect, MDM rollout, or real project version/build bump was changed or claimed.

contract_status_changes.before: bump-version and set-build-number had no focused automation tests proving the documented MARKETING_VERSION and CURRENT_PROJECT_VERSION policy in isolated fixtures.
contract_status_changes.after: automation/tests/test_bump_version.py executes the real scripts in temp fixtures and proves policy behavior without mutating real release metadata.

residual_risks: The tests run the shell scripts in a temporary fixture; they intentionally do not perform a real Owlory release bump, archive, TestFlight upload, or App Store Connect version creation.
The real repository still has no top-level CHANGELOG.md file in this checkout; CHANGELOG promotion is proven against the fixture file created by the test.
recommended_next_reason: No adjacent queued release slice remains after this one; run the supervisor/clean-stop gate to choose any broader next work.
